svg.title: Canvas Protocol — full system architecture
svg.desc: Three actor boxes feed through Bankr and Telegram Bot API into a Railway agent server. Validate path routes above the second inner row. Contract Calls exits to Smart Contract from a left-offset position. Smart contract on Base holds escrow and releases payouts.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the advertiser buy verifications via the Canvas Bankr agent?')
sendPrompt('What does the human experience during the captcha verification?')
sendPrompt('How does the group owner register their group and wallet through Bankr?')
sendPrompt('What does the Canvas AI buy flow conversation look like for the advertiser?')
sendPrompt('How does the Telegram Bot API webhook work and what does bot admin require?')
sendPrompt('What does the Canvas AI register flow conversation look like for the group owner?')
sendPrompt('What does the bot handler manage — join intercept, mute, DM task, response?')
sendPrompt('What state does Postgres store — group registry, verification queue, budgets?')
sendPrompt('How does Kimi inference score a captcha response and what triggers a pass?')
sendPrompt('What are the step 1 and step 2 contract calls and when do they fire?')
sendPrompt('How is Kimi API called and what does the quality score response look like?')
sendPrompt('How does the smart contract hold escrow and release step 1 and step 2 payouts?')
g.text: holds USDC · ① log · ② payout to owner
